sections.title: Without an Amulet of ghostspeak or Morytania legs 2 or higher equipped

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Lion
lines.text: Woo wooo!

sections.title: With an Amulet of ghostspeak or Morytania legs 2 or higher equipped

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Lion
lines.text: Don't you know? I am a proud Knight of the Lion, serving under the Justiciar of the Lion.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Lion
lines.text: And you are the adventurer who disturbed my rest!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah... I'm not really all that sorry about that. I was searching for Hallowed marks. Although I didn't actually intend to disturb you if that's any consolation.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Lion
lines.text: Hallowed marks? That currency is reserved only for the devout followers of holy Saradomin. Are you a follower, adventurer?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I follow Saradomin.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Lion
lines.text: I see! Yes, I can sense that you at least carry some items bearing his symbol. Well met fellow follower! Do tell, what is the Justiciar of the Lion up to these days?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The Justiciar of the Lion? I've never heard of them.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Lion
lines.text: By Saradomin's mercy! Are you serious adventurer? You've never heard of her glory?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Lion
lines.text: The statue in the south east bears her resemblance. I remember the day it was built in her honour.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Lion
lines.text: The Justiciar of the Lion is a title bestowed upon the most powerful wizard of our order. She was capable of wiping out an entire army of Zamorakian demons with a single spell!

lines.speaker: Knight of the Lion
lines.text: I lament that I could not learn more from her in life but I do not regret for a single instant following her to my grave.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see, she sounds like an inspirational figure indeed. Do you know where I can find her?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Lion
lines.text: I was hoping that you could tell me. Last I heard, she was residing in the college here in Hallowvale.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh dear...

lines.speaker: Knight of the Lion
lines.text: Is something wrong adventurer?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Never mind, you don't want to know.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Lion
lines.text: You lie adventurer. I do not sense a single item of holy Saradomin on your person.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Lion
lines.text: To think that our currency is being handled by non- followers. It's a disgrace! If I weren't dead, I'd incinerate you where you stand for your impudence!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah well, you are dead and I have your currency so you're going to have to... live with that!

lines.speaker: Knight of the Lion
lines.text: I don't appreciate your attempts at humour, non- follower.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I follow another god.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Lion
lines.text: To think that our currency is being handled by non- followers. It's a disgrace! If I weren't dead, I'd incinerate you where you stand for your impudence!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah well, you are dead and I have your currency so you're going to have to... live with that!

lines.speaker: Knight of the Lion
lines.text: I don't appreciate your attempts at humour, non- follower.

sections.title: Upon opening a coffin in the Hallowed Sepulchre
Without an Amulet of ghostspeak or Morytania legs 2 or higher equipped

lines.speaker: Knight of the Lion
lines.text: Woo? Woo wooooooooo!

sections.title: With an Amulet of ghostspeak or Morytania legs 2 or higher equipped

lines.speaker: Knight of the Lion
lines.text: You dare defile this sacred place? That treasure doesn't belong to you!
